Scheduler Error Status

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x170
Size:
0x4
Source:
stream_regs.rdl

Description

Per-channel scheduler error flags

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:8] RSVD r 0x0 -
[7:0] SCHED_ERR r - -

Field Descriptions

RSVD

Reserved

SCHED_ERR

Scheduler error bits [7:0] - 1=error detected, 0=no error
